Marketing support

Book a Call Out Day.

Bring a dedicated Purple product specialist on-site, or virtual, for the day. Use it to back up a customer demo, staff a trade show stand, or run a targeted sales push with your team.

A dedicated product specialistA Purple expert joins your team in person or virtually for the full day, no extra cost to you.
Live product demosReal-time demos of Staff WiFi, Guest WiFi, Multi-tenant WiFi, and the Purple app, tailored to the customer in front of you.
Co-branded materialsPresentation decks, one-pagers, and signage branded with your logo alongside Purple's.
Warm-lead follow-upEvery lead generated on the day is logged and followed up jointly by your team and ours.
Book a Call Out Day
For registered partners only. Not yet a partner? Apply here.

Request received

Your partner manager will follow up to confirm details and lock in a date.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.
